findings.source_type_citation: Source document type for Form 8-K - Current Report
findings.competitors_citation: Competitors mentioned in Form 8-K - Current Report
findings.keywords_citation: Keywords mentioned in Form 8-K - Current Report
findings.summary: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics filed a Form 8-K on May 11, 2026, announcing a positive outcome from its final pre-BLA meeting with the U.S. FDA for sonelokimab in hidradenitis suppurativa (HS). The FDA and MoonLake aligned on submission plans, label strategy, and the inclusion of adolescent data. The BLA submission is planned for late September 2026. The filing also included the company's Q1 2026 financial results.

findings.source_type_citation: Source document type for Form 10-Q - Quarterly Report
findings.competitors_citation: Competitors mentioned in Form 10-Q - Quarterly Report
findings.keywords_citation: Keywords mentioned in Form 10-Q - Quarterly Report
findings.summary: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics filed its Form 10-Q for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, on May 11, 2026. The company reported a net loss of $69.7 million for the quarter and held $357.9 million in cash and cash equivalents. The report highlights the development of sonelokimab, an IL-17A and IL-17F inhibitor, in various inflammatory indications including hidradenitis suppurativa (HS).

findings.source_type_citation: Source document type for Nkarta Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Corporate Highlights
findings.competitors_citation: Competitors mentioned in Nkarta Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Corporate Highlights
findings.keywords_citation: Keywords mentioned in Nkarta Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Corporate Highlights
findings.summary: Nkarta reported financial results for the first quarter of 2026 and provided a business update. The company reached an agreement with the FDA to amend its clinical protocols for NKX019, allowing for outpatient dosing and the expansion of the Ntrust-2 study to include rheumatoid arthritis. Initial clinical data from the Ntrust-1 and Ntrust-2 trials are expected in 2026. The company ended the quarter with $266.7 million in cash, expected to fund operations into 2029.
findings.summary_citation: Summary of Nkarta Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Corporate Highlights
